channel.title: Outhan Chazima — Blog
channel.description: Engineering notes on system design, distributed systems and applied AI.

item.title: Designing idempotent payment APIs that never double-charge
item.description: A practical guide to exactly-once payment semantics — idempotency keys, request fingerprints, and the database patterns that make retries safe.

item.title: Five lessons from running event-driven systems in production
item.description: Hard-won lessons on Kafka, eventual consistency, idempotent consumers, and observability from building event-driven platforms at scale.
